feature: Match8 - Match clause interoperation with other clauses

scenarios.id: Match8 - Match clause interoperation with other clauses-[1] Pattern independent of bound variables results in cross product
scenarios.description: [1] Pattern independent of bound variables results in cross product
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)
WITH a
MATCH (b)
RETURN a, b
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: WITH clause in pipeline not fully supported

scenarios.id: Match8 - Match clause interoperation with other clauses-[2] Counting rows after MATCH, MERGE, OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.description: [2] Counting rows after MATCH, MERGE, OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)
MERGE (b)
WITH *
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)--(b)
RETURN count(*)
scenarios.skip_reason: binder: MERGE clause not yet bound

scenarios.id: Match8 - Match clause interoperation with other clauses-[3] Matching and disregarding output, then matching again
scenarios.description: [3] Matching and disregarding output, then matching again
scenarios.query:
MATCH ()-->()
WITH 1 AS x
MATCH ()-[r1]->()<--()
RETURN sum(r1.times)
scenarios.skip_reason: engine: WITH clause in pipeline not fully supported
